prompts.seed:
Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds.

Respond with exactly one category name from the list above and nothing else.
prompts.x1:
Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds.

Category definitions and decision rules:
- reverted_card_payment?: Payment was refunded, reversed, cancelled, or reverted after initially being processed
- get_physical_card: Requesting a new physical card OR asking about card PIN location/number (not forgotten passcode for app login)
- passcode_forgotten: Forgotten passcode/password for APP or ACCOUNT login (not card PIN)
- balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer: Balance has not updated/reflected after making a bank transfer (not asking about timing in general)
- transfer_timing: General questions about how long transfers take or processing times
- beneficiary_not_allowed: Unable to add beneficiary or transfer to a specific account/person (not general transfer failures)
- failed_transfer: Transfer failed due to technical issues (not beneficiary restrictions)
- receiving_money: About receiving/getting money into your account from someone else
- pending_transfer: Transfer is stuck in pending status
- pending_top_up: Top-up is stuck in pending status
- top_up_reverted: Top-up was reversed or refunded
- topping_up_by_card: How to add money using a card

Respond with exactly one category name from the list above and nothing else.
prompts.x2:
Classify the given text into one of these categories: automatic_top_up, balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer, beneficiary_not_allowed, cancel_transfer, card_payment_fee_charged, card_payment_not_recognised, declined_cash_withdrawal, exchange_rate, exchange_via_app, failed_transfer, get_disposable_virtual_card, get_physical_card, passcode_forgotten, pending_top_up, pending_transfer, receiving_money, reverted_card_payment?, top_up_by_cash_or_cheque, top_up_reverted, topping_up_by_card, transfer_fee_charged, transfer_into_account, transfer_timing, verify_my_identity, verify_source_of_funds.

Category definitions and decision rules:

- beneficiary_not_allowed: User CANNOT transfer to a specific account/person due to restrictions or errors when attempting. Includes "unable to transfer", "can't transfer", "won't let me transfer", "error when transferring". This takes priority over failed_transfer when the issue involves inability to complete a transfer action.

- failed_transfer: Transfer failed due to technical/system issues but NOT because of beneficiary restrictions.

- pending_transfer: A specific transfer the user already initiated is stuck in pending/processing status and hasn't completed yet. If they mention waiting for a transfer they sent, it's pending_transfer not transfer_timing.

- transfer_timing: General questions about how long transfers take, asked BEFORE or WITHOUT reference to a specific pending transfer. If asking about an already-sent transfer that hasn't arrived, classify as pending_transfer instead.

- balance_not_updated_after_bank_transfer: User's balance has not reflected/updated after they made a bank transfer. The transfer was completed but balance is wrong. Questions asking IF transfers are immediate or about general processing times are transfer_timing, not this category.

- receiving_money: About receiving money FROM another person into your account. The user is the recipient, not the sender.

- topping_up_by_card: How to add money to YOUR OWN account using a card. If asking about someone ELSE (friend, family) topping up the user's account, this is receiving_money instead.

- pending_top_up: Top-up is stuck in pending status.

- top_up_reverted: Top-up was reversed or refunded.

- reverted_card_payment?: Card payment was refunded, reversed, cancelled, or reverted after initially being processed.

- get_physical_card: Requesting a new physical card OR asking about card PIN location/number (not forgotten passcode for app login).

- passcode_forgotten: Forgotten passcode/password for APP or ACCOUNT login (not card PIN).

- cancel_transfer: Wanting to cancel or stop a transfer.

- transfer_into_account: Questions about transferring money into the user's account.

- card_payment_not_recognised: Card payment not recognized or unfamiliar charge.

- card_payment_fee_charged: Fees charged on card payments.

- transfer_fee_charged: Fees charged on transfers.

- exchange_rate: Questions about currency exchange rates.

- exchange_via_app: How to exchange currency using the app.

- automatic_top_up: Setting up or managing automatic top-ups.

- declined_cash_withdrawal: Cash withdrawal was declined or rejected.

- get_disposable_virtual_card: Getting a disposable or virtual card.

- top_up_by_cash_or_cheque: Topping up using cash or cheque.

- verify_my_identity: Identity verification requests.

- verify_source_of_funds: Source of funds verification requests.

Respond with exactly one category name from the list above and nothing else.
